author: Daniel Wahnich
name: Aweb Depth Recurrence + MoE + TTT
blurb: 4 unique blocks × 6 repeats = 24 effective layers at 768 dim with 4-expert MoE routing, SwiGLU activation, Quantization-Aware Training, and Test-Time Training at eval. Weight sharing gives 2.67× depth of baseline with same param budget. MoE specializes 4 tiny experts per block (192 hidden each). QAT trains through int8 noise. TTT adapts MLP weights on validation context before final scoring.
